title: Update tests if behavior or docs changes require it
summary: Adjust or add tests only when changes to .rules, zed-agentops-init.sh, or README* affect behavior or documented expectations.
acceptance_criteria: Tests are updated or added only when needed for behavioral or documented changes.
Updated tests align with the current MCP server behavior and guidance.
No unrelated test modifications are introduced.

steps.description: Identify any behavior or expectation changes introduced by p2-t1 through p2-t3.
Update or add tests to reflect the changes, keeping scope minimal.
Confirm tests remain consistent with src/ behavior and documentation.

notes: No test updates required; documentation/script changes did not alter runtime behavior.
